summary: The balcony is a modern, high-specification outdoor space in excellent decorative order. It features high-quality grey grooved composite decking, a dark bronze powder-coated metal balustrade, and off-white/cream textured exterior wall render. All elements show very light weathering consistent with outdoor exposure but remain clean and in highly serviceable condition.

items.name: Composite decking
items.description: Grey grooved composite decking boards fitted in parallel run.
defects: Light outdoor dust and minor weathering marks throughout
Water spots/marks to surface from weather

items.name: External walls
items.description: Off-white/cream textured render cladding panels to the building exterior.
defects: Light superficial weathering and dust build-up

items.name: Balcony ceiling
items.description: Smooth painted cream/off-white soffit paneling to the underside of the balcony above.

items.name: Balcony railing
items.description: Dark bronze/brown powder-coated metal balustrade with square vertical spindles and a flat-profile handrail.
defects: Light dust and water marks to upper surfaces of handrail

items.name: Sliding balcony door frame
items.description: Dark bronze/brown powder-coated aluminium framed sliding patio door, including low-profile threshold track.
defects: Minor surface dust to exterior frames
Light scuffing to the bottom track from foot traffic

items.name: Balcony door glazing
items.description: Double-glazed safety glass panels set within the sliding door.
defects: Minor external water spots and light condensation streaks

items.name: Inset decking lights
items.description: Small circular flush-mounted metal-rimmed uplights embedded in the decking.
defects: Minor weathering and tarnish to outer metal rims
